name: Kange Corp.
summary: Kange Corp., a development stage company, develops and sells mobile software products for Apple and Android platforms in Estonia and Europe. It plans to sell its applications through Apple's App Store or through its online retail Website to small business owners, who desire their own mobile applications and want to control the content. The company was founded in 2013 and is headquartered in Studio City, California. Kange Corp. is a subsidiary of AMJ Global, LLC.
